zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel De Paveley於1324年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾包勒斯普利時，她的父親Sir John de Paveley28歲，母親Joan Sturly or Sturry-37歲。她於1345年與Sir John St John在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1443年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根費爾--享年119歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel De Paveley于1324年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾包勒斯普利时，她的父亲Sir John de Paveley28岁，母亲Joan Sturly or Sturry-37岁。她于1345年与Sir John St John在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1443年在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根費爾--享年119岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Paveley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pavelin
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Paveley ( see Pawley ) with an excrescent -n.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel De Paveley was born in 1324, in Paulerspury, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Paveley, was 28 and her mother, Joan Sturly or Sturry, was -37. She married Sir John St John in 1345, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1443, in Ffwl-y-Mwn, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 119.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel De Paveley est née en 1324, à Paulerspury, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Paveley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Sturly or Sturry, avait -37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John St John en 1345, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1443, à Ffwl-y-Mwn, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 119 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel De Paveley 1324 in Paulerspury, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Paveley 28 und ihre Mutter Joan Sturly or Sturry -37. Sie hat 1345 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Sir John St John geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1443 im Alter von 119 Jahren in Ffwl-y-Mwn, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel De Paveleyが1324年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアプアウラースプウリーで生まれた時，父Sir John de Paveleyは28歳，母Joan Sturly or Sturryは-37歳であった。1345年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンでSir John St Johnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1443年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンフウル-イ-ムウンで119歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel De Paveley(이)가 1324년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 폴르스푸리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Paveley(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Sturly or Sturry(은)는 -37세였다. 그녀는 1345년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 Sir John St John(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1443년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 프w-이-w에서 119세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel De Paveley nasceu em 1324, em Paulerspury, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Paveley, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Sturly or Sturry, tinha -37 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John St John em 1345, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1443, em Ffwl-y-Mwn, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, com 119 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel De Paveley родилась в 1324 г. в местности поулирспури, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Paveley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Sturly or Sturry, -37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John St John в 1345 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1443 г. в местности ффвл-и-мвн, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 119 лет.
